==={{aniseries|JN}}===
[[File:Sophocles JN.png|thumb|250px|left|Sophocles in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'']]
In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Sophocles joined his classmates in a welcome party for Ash and [[Goh]] when they came to visit Alola. He also revealed that he was planning to revisit [[Mossdeep City]] in the future. He later watched a battle between Kiawe and Goh along with his classmates.

Sophocles met Ash and Goh again in ''[[JN096|Lighting the Way Home!]]''. This time, Ash and Goh visited his work at the Mossdeep Space Center, but during the attempts to guide the {{p|Talonflame}} 2 space probe back home, Sophocles and the {{p|Ampharos}} he was caring for begun to doubt their abilities. With the help of Ash, Goh, and their Pokémon, Sophocles managed to help get the probe safely to land on the planet.

In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Sophocles attended a party to celebrate the return of Lillie and her family to Alola after they found Mohn, reuniting with Lillie, Ash, and Goh and meeting [[Chloe]]. The next day, Sophocles watched a [[Battle Royal]] match between Ash, Kiawe, Gladion, and Professor Kukui.

In ''[[JN131|Paring Pokémon While Parrying!]]'' and ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Sophocles was seen watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}} at the Pokémon School.
